name: PAPAO: The Legend of the Bogeyman
short_description: PAPAO: The Legend of the Bogeyman is a horror game with mascots. Face mystical figures in dark settings, solve mysteries, and use toys as weapons to tackle challenges as you guide a child through an intense, puzzle-filled storyline
detailed_description:
Be brave. Be smart. Don't let midnight be the end.

In PAPAO: The Legend of the Bogeyman, you are a child who ignored your parents' warnings and now faces terrifying consequences. When the legendary Bogeyman visits you, he delivers a chilling ultimatum: he will return at midnight to take you.

With time against you, it’s time to act! Your mission is twofold: stop the Bogeyman from fulfilling his promise and uncover dark secrets that tie into your own fate. Face your deepest fears as you explore the monster's mysterious lair searching for answers. Tackle eerie challenges, solve hidden mysteries, and find the strength needed to defeat the fearsome Bogeyman.

Your destiny is not yours alone — it’s in your hands to save children worldwide. Prepare yourself for an adventure full of suspense, courage, and surprising twists.

Enter the monster's lair and prove you’re not afraid of the Bogeyman!

Use toys as weapons to defend yourself and overcome various challenging puzzles.

PAPAO: The Legend of the Bogeyman offers the option to disable blood textures, specially designed for more sensitive audiences.

PAPAO: The Legend of the Bogeyman is a complete game, including five chapters already included.

Chapter 1: Home Sweet Home? You are home alone and receive a visit from the Boogeyman. Complete the tasks before the monster emerges from the darkness to get you.

Chapter 2: Falling into Darkness! Seeking answers, our hero enters the monster’s lair—a themed factory that does not belong to our world.

Chapter 3: Play, Work, and Don’t Die! Now equipped, our hero can walk among the machines and escape from them.

Chapter 4: The Witch’s Labyrinth Offices and ventilation ducts can be a problem, especially if something is lurking.

Final Chapter: Who’s Afraid of the Boogeyman! The ravenous monster has left a trail of destruction across the world. Now, with the help of the guardians, face it head-on and save the world!

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil*, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
